title: TIMCO Classic Multi-Purpose Screws - 4.0 x 40 - A2 Stainless Steel - Box of 200
description: Product DescriptionAll the features and superior performance of the Classic Multi-Purpose Screw manufactured from A2 Stainless Steel. Ideal where ultimate corrosion resistance is required when fixing to softwoods, hardwood (pre-drilled), chipboard, MDF and plastic. Stainless steel must be used where there is corrosive environment and/or the base material has inherent corrosive characteristics e.g. Green Oak. NOTE: Sharp point only.Box Contains200 x Classic Screws
features: Double Countersunk head reduces the likelihood of head sheer and assists completion of countersinking
New patented molecular lubrication is designed to enhance screw insertion time and provides greater resistance to corrosion
40 degree deep single thread provides a secure fixing with high pull-out resistance A 25 sharp point assists with easy penetration
Special thread configuration gives an ultimate performance and an exceptionally high pull-out resistance
Surface hardened up to 750 HV to prevent torque shearing Made form stainless steel for the ultimate corrosion resistance
breadCrumbs: DIY & Tools > Hardware > Nails, Screws & Fasteners > Screws
